payload.answer: Extracted three durable architecture decisions and two open questions. No conflicts or superseded facts were present in the input.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: Commit the stated architecture decisions as current; preserve Telegram/model choice items as open questions, not decisions.

entity_resolution.reason: The summary refers to architectural components and integrations by name but provides no existing entity IDs; resolve by canonical names if present, otherwise create/update corresponding entities.

payload.intent: Extract durable architectural decisions and open questions from the chat summary for Brain memory.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB rather than the source of truth.
Slack should operate as a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later as a Brain integration.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance for Brain-related workflows.

details: Preserved Telegram and model choice as open questions rather than facts.
No deleted or superseded facts were presented as current.
